option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
package com.example.woofie.data
import com.example.woofie.model.Profession import com.example.woofie.model.QuizQuestion import com.example.woofie.model.UserProfile
object WoofieRepository { data class LessonOutcome( val correctAnswers: Int, val totalQuestions: Int, val earnedXp: Int, val passed: Boolean ) { val scoreLabel: String = "$correctAnswers/$totalQuestions" }
const val LESSON_SIZE = 10 const val MIN_CORRECT_TO_PASS = 8
var profile: UserProfile? = null var lastResultLabel: String? = null var lastEarnedXp: Int = 0 var lastLessonPassed: Boolean = false
fun getQuestionsFor(profession: Profession): List<QuizQuestion> { return when (profession) { Profession.IT -> listOf( QuizQuestion( prompt = "How do you say 'ticket resuelto' in a sprint update?", options = listOf("Solved ticket", "Strong ticket", "Ticket weather"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Choose the best phrase for daily standup:", options = listOf("I blocked yesterday", "I am blocked by API", "I was coding table"), correctIndex = 1 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'deployment completed successfully'?", options = listOf("La reunion fue cancelada", "El despliegue termino bien", "No hay conexion"), correctIndex = 1 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Necesito revisar los logs del servidor'.", options = listOf("I need to review the server logs", "I need to remove the server", "I need to copy the table"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best reply for a bug report:", options = listOf("Thanks, I will investigate and update you", "No, this is not possible", "Try tomorrow maybe"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Subi el cambio a produccion'.", options = listOf("I deleted the production", "I deployed the change to production", "I changed my position"), correctIndex = 1 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Choose the best sentence for code review:", options = listOf("Could you review this pull request?", "Could you remove this sprint?", "Could you move this monitor?"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'rollback the release'?", options = listOf("Lanzar una nueva version", "Volver a la version anterior", "Cerrar la reunion"), correctIndex = 1 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'La API responde con error 500'.", options = listOf("The API returns a 500 error", "The API returns a happy message", "The API returns a new user"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase for planning meeting:", options = listOf("Let's estimate these tasks", "Let's avoid all tasks", "Let's delay all clients"), correctIndex = 0 ) )
Profession.HEALTH -> listOf( QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Tome este medicamento dos veces al dia'", options = listOf( "Take this medicine twice a day", "Drink this medicine all week", "Call this medicine now" ), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase to ask patient comfort:", options = listOf("Are you feeling comfortable?", "You are fine now?", "Can you sleep medicine?"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'follow-up appointment'?", options = listOf("Cita de seguimiento", "Cita urgente", "Examen de sangre"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Respire profundo, todo esta bajo control'.", options = listOf("Breathe deeply, everything is under control", "Move quickly, nothing is in control", "Take medicine right now"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase before checking vital signs:", options = listOf("I will check your vital signs", "I will cancel your room", "I will move your appointment"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'blood pressure is stable'?", options = listOf("La presion arterial esta estable", "La presion es urgente", "No hay resultado"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Debe guardar reposo por tres dias'.", options = listOf("You should rest for three days", "You should run for three days", "You should skip your meal"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best way to confirm allergies:", options = listOf("Do you have any allergies?", "Do you have your salary?", "Do you have your bag?"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Le explicare el tratamiento paso a paso'.", options = listOf("I will explain the treatment step by step", "I will skip the treatment today", "I will call treatment later"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'discharge instructions'?", options = listOf("Instrucciones de alta", "Instrucciones de ingreso", "Resultados de laboratorio"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase for pain level check:", options = listOf("How would you rate your pain from 1 to 10?", "Are you ready to walk now?", "Do you want another room?"), correctIndex = 0 ) )
Profession.SALES -> listOf( QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Podemos agendar una llamada de seguimiento'", options = listOf( "Can we schedule a follow-up call?", "Can we close now?", "Can we buy this later?" ), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Choose the best sentence for objection handling:", options = listOf("I understand your concern", "You are wrong", "This is impossible"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'pricing proposal attached'?", options = listOf("Propuesta de precios adjunta", "Cliente no responde", "Producto agotado"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Gracias por tu tiempo en la reunion'.", options = listOf("Thank you for your time in the meeting", "You are late for the meeting", "We cancel your request"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best opening for discovery call:", options = listOf("Can you tell me about your current process?", "Can you buy this right now?", "Can you pay before the call?"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Te envio un resumen por correo'.", options = listOf("I will send you a summary by email", "I will send you a call by phone", "I will send you a discount now"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'decision-maker'?", options = listOf("Persona que toma la decision", "Persona que recibe facturas", "Persona que entrega pedidos"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase to close next step:", options = listOf("Does next Tuesday work for a demo?", "Do you want to stop this now?", "Can you call me never?"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Nuestro plan incluye soporte prioritario'.", options = listOf("Our plan includes priority support", "Our plan includes random meetings", "Our plan includes free hardware"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'contract renewal'?", options = listOf("Renovacion de contrato", "Cancelacion inmediata", "Compra de inventario"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best response to budget concern:", options = listOf("I understand. Let's review options that fit your budget", "Budget is not important", "Then this is over"), correctIndex = 0 ) ) } }
fun registerLessonResult(correctAnswers: Int, totalAnswers: Int = LESSON_SIZE): LessonOutcome { val currentProfile = profile ?: return LessonOutcome( correctAnswers = correctAnswers, totalQuestions = totalAnswers, earnedXp = 0, passed = false )
val passedLesson = correctAnswers >= MIN_CORRECT_TO_PASS val earnedXp = (correctAnswers * 12) + if (passedLesson) 40 else 10
currentProfile.completedLessons += 1 currentProfile.xp += earnedXp currentProfile.streak += 1 lastResultLabel = "$correctAnswers/$totalAnswers" lastEarnedXp = earnedXp lastLessonPassed = passedLesson
return LessonOutcome( correctAnswers = correctAnswers, totalQuestions = totalAnswers, earnedXp = earnedXp, passed = passedLesson ) } }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
package com.example.woofie.data
import com.example.woofie.model.Profession import com.example.woofie.model.QuizQuestion import com.example.woofie.model.UserProfile
object WoofieRepository { data class LessonOutcome( val correctAnswers: Int, val totalQuestions: Int, val earnedXp: Int, val passed: Boolean ) { val scoreLabel: String = "$correctAnswers/$totalQuestions" }
const val LESSON_SIZE = 8 const val MIN_CORRECT_TO_PASS = 6
var profile: UserProfile? = null var lastResultLabel: String? = null var lastEarnedXp: Int = 0 var lastLessonPassed: Boolean = false
fun getQuestionsFor(profession: Profession): List<QuizQuestion> { return when (profession) { Profession.IT -> listOf( QuizQuestion( prompt = "How do you say 'ticket resuelto' in a sprint update?", options = listOf("Solved ticket", "Strong ticket", "Ticket weather"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Choose the best phrase for daily standup:", options = listOf("I blocked yesterday", "I am blocked by API", "I was coding table"), correctIndex = 1 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'deployment completed successfully'?", options = listOf("La reunion fue cancelada", "El despliegue termino bien", "No hay conexion"), correctIndex = 1 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Necesito revisar los logs del servidor'.", options = listOf("I need to review the server logs", "I need to paint the server", "I need to close the office"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase for code review request:", options = listOf("Could you review this pull request?", "Could you remove this keyboard?", "Could you call my manager now?"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'rollback to previous version'?", options = listOf("Avanzar a la siguiente version", "Volver a la version anterior", "Eliminar el proyecto"), correctIndex = 1 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'La API responde con timeout'.", options = listOf("The API responds with a timeout", "The API responds with a smile", "The API responds with a shortcut"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best sentence for sprint planning:", options = listOf("Let's estimate these tasks", "Let's cancel all tasks", "Let's ship without tests"), correctIndex = 0 ) )
Profession.HEALTH -> listOf( QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Tome este medicamento dos veces al dia'", options = listOf( "Take this medicine twice a day", "Drink this medicine all week", "Call this medicine now" ), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase to ask patient comfort:", options = listOf("Are you feeling comfortable?", "You are fine now?", "Can you sleep medicine?"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'follow-up appointment'?", options = listOf("Cita de seguimiento", "Cita urgente", "Examen de sangre"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Respire profundo, todo esta bajo control'.", options = listOf("Breathe deeply, everything is under control", "Run quickly, nothing is ready", "Drink this later"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase before checking vital signs:", options = listOf("I will check your vital signs", "I will cancel your room", "I will call your office"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Debe guardar reposo por tres dias'.", options = listOf("You should rest for three days", "You should walk for three hours", "You should skip your meal"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'discharge instructions'?", options = listOf("Instrucciones de alta", "Instrucciones de ingreso", "Resultado de radiografia"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase for pain scale question:", options = listOf("How would you rate your pain from 1 to 10?", "Can you pay now?", "Do you need a new room key?"), correctIndex = 0 ) )
Profession.SALES -> listOf( QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Podemos agendar una llamada de seguimiento'", options = listOf( "Can we schedule a follow-up call?", "Can we close now?", "Can we buy this later?" ), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Choose the best sentence for objection handling:", options = listOf("I understand your concern", "You are wrong", "This is impossible"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'pricing proposal attached'?", options = listOf("Propuesta de precios adjunta", "Cliente no responde", "Producto agotado"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Gracias por tu tiempo en la reunion'.", options = listOf("Thank you for your time in the meeting", "You are late for the meeting", "Let's stop this forever"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best opening for discovery call:", options = listOf("Can you tell me about your current process?", "Can you buy now in one minute?", "Can you send money first?"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Te envio un resumen por correo'.", options = listOf("I will send you a summary by email", "I will send you a car by noon", "I will send you a voice note to HR"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'decision-maker'?", options = listOf("Persona que toma la decision", "Persona que guarda facturas", "Persona que recibe paquetes"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase to schedule next step:", options = listOf("Does next Tuesday work for a demo?", "Do you want to cancel all meetings?", "Can you transfer now?"), correctIndex = 0 ) ) } }
fun registerLessonResult(correctAnswers: Int, totalAnswers: Int = LESSON_SIZE): LessonOutcome { val currentProfile = profile ?: return LessonOutcome( correctAnswers = correctAnswers, totalQuestions = totalAnswers, earnedXp = 0, passed = false )
val passedLesson = correctAnswers >= MIN_CORRECT_TO_PASS val earnedXp = (correctAnswers * 12) + if (passedLesson) 40 else 10
currentProfile.completedLessons += 1 currentProfile.xp += earnedXp currentProfile.streak += 1 lastResultLabel = "$correctAnswers/$totalAnswers" lastEarnedXp = earnedXp lastLessonPassed = passedLesson
return LessonOutcome( correctAnswers = correctAnswers, totalQuestions = totalAnswers, earnedXp = earnedXp, passed = passedLesson ) } }

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
package com.example.woofie.ui.common
import android.view.View import androidx.core.view.ViewCompat import androidx.core.view.WindowInsetsCompat import androidx.core.view.updatePadding
fun View.applySystemBarsPadding(includeTop: Boolean = true, includeBottom: Boolean = true) { val leftPadding = paddingLeft val topPadding = paddingTop val rightPadding = paddingRight val bottomPadding = paddingBottom
ViewCompat.setOnApplyWindowInsetsListener(this) { view, insets -> val bars = insets.getInsets(WindowInsetsCompat.Type.systemBars()) view.updatePadding( left = leftPadding, top = topPadding + if (includeTop) bars.top else 0, right = rightPadding, bottom = bottomPadding + if (includeBottom) bars.bottom else 0 ) insets } requestApplyInsets() }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <translate xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:duration="260" android:fromXDelta="-6dp" android:interpolator="@android:anim/cycle_interpolator" android:toXDelta="6dp" />

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <set xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:duration="220"> <translate android:fromYDelta="10%" android:toYDelta="0" /> <alpha android:fromAlpha="0.0" android:toAlpha="1.0" /> </set>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <corners android:radius="14dp" /> <solid android:color="@color/woofie_primary" /> <stroke android:width="2dp" android:color="@color/woofie_primary_dark" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <corners android:radius="14dp" /> <solid android:color="@color/woofie_accent" /> <stroke android:width="2dp" android:color="@color/woofie_primary_dark" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <corners android:radius="14dp" /> <solid android:color="@color/woofie_gray_200" /> <stroke android:width="1dp" android:color="@color/woofie_gray_500" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <corners android:radius="14dp" /> <solid android:color="@color/woofie_surface" /> <stroke android:width="2dp" android:color="@color/woofie_primary" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="@color/woofie_primary" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <corners android:radius="2dp" /> <solid android:color="@color/woofie_gray_200" /> </shape>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textHomeGreeting" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="30sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/woofie_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:strokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imageWolf" android:layout_width="72dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:contentDescription="@string/wolf_content_description" android:src="@drawable/woofie_wolf" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textHomeProfession" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" android:textSize="15sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:id="@+id/textHomeStreak" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:background="@drawable/card_woofie_outline" android:padding="14dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonStartLesson" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/woofie_accent" android:text="@string/home_start_lesson" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonOpenProgress" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="@string/home_open_progress" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" app:strokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textHomeGreeting" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="30sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/woofie_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:strokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imageWolf" android:layout_width="72dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:src="@drawable/woofie_wolf" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textHomeProfession" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" android:textSize="15sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:id="@+id/textHomeStreak" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:background="@drawable/card_woofie_outline" android:padding="14dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonStartLesson" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/woofie_accent" android:text="@string/home_start_lesson" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonOpenProgress" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="@string/home_open_progress" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" app:strokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textLessonProgress" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textLessonQuestion" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textLessonGoal" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/lesson_goal" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<RadioGroup android:id="@+id/optionsGroup" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp">
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/optionOne" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:background="@drawable/lesson_option_selector" android:button="@null" android:padding="14dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/optionTwo" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:background="@drawable/lesson_option_selector" android:button="@null" android:padding="14dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/optionThree" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:background="@drawable/lesson_option_selector" android:button="@null" android:padding="14dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" /> </RadioGroup>
<TextView android:id="@+id/textLessonResult" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonCheck" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/woofie_accent" android:text="@string/lesson_check" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" /> </LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textLessonProgress" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.progressindicator.LinearProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/lessonProgressBar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="10dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:max="100" app:indicatorColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:trackColor="@color/woofie_gray_200" app:trackCornerRadius="6dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textLessonQuestion" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textLessonGoal" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/lesson_goal" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<RadioGroup android:id="@+id/optionsGroup" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp">
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/optionOne" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:background="@drawable/lesson_option_selector" android:button="@null" android:padding="14dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/optionTwo" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:background="@drawable/lesson_option_selector" android:button="@null" android:padding="14dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/optionThree" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:background="@drawable/lesson_option_selector" android:button="@null" android:padding="14dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" /> </RadioGroup>
<TextView android:id="@+id/textLessonResult" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardWrongFeedback" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:visibility="gone" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/woofie_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:strokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textWrongFeedbackTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/lesson_feedback_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textWrongFeedbackBody" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="2" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textWrongFeedbackHint" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/lesson_feedback_expand" android:textColor="@color/woofie_accent_strong" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonCheck" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/woofie_accent" android:text="@string/lesson_check" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" /> </LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/lessonPathRoot" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/lesson_path_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="26sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/lesson_path_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/pathContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:orientation="vertical" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/lessonPathRoot" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/lesson_path_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="26sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/lesson_path_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/woofie_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:strokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/lesson_path_trail_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<HorizontalScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:scrollbars="none">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/pathTrailContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="4dp" /> </HorizontalScrollView> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/pathContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:orientation="vertical" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="82dp" android:layout_height="82dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:contentDescription="@string/wolf_content_description" android:src="@drawable/woofie_wolf" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/onboarding_title" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/onboarding_subtitle" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" android:textSize="15sp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/woofie_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:strokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/onboarding_profession_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup android:id="@+id/chipProfessionGroup" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipProfessionIt" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/profession_it" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_background_selector" app:chipStrokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipProfessionHealth" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/profession_health" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_background_selector" app:chipStrokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipProfessionSales" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/profession_sales" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_background_selector" app:chipStrokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" /> </com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/onboarding_level_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup android:id="@+id/chipLevelGroup" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipLevelA1" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/level_a1" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_background_selector" app:chipStrokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipLevelA2" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/level_a2" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_background_selector" app:chipStrokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipLevelB1" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/level_b1" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_background_selector" app:chipStrokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" /> </com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup>
<TextView android:id="@+id/textSelectionSummary" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/onboarding_summary_empty" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonContinue" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="22dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/woofie_accent" android:enabled="false" android:text="@string/onboarding_continue" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="82dp" android:layout_height="82dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:contentDescription="@string/wolf_content_description" android:src="@drawable/woofie_wolf" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/onboarding_title" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/onboarding_subtitle" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" android:textSize="15sp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/woofie_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:strokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/onboarding_profession_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup android:id="@+id/chipProfessionGroup" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipProfessionIt" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/profession_it" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_background_selector" app:chipStrokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipProfessionHealth" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/profession_health" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_background_selector" app:chipStrokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipProfessionSales" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/profession_sales" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_background_selector" app:chipStrokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" /> </com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/onboarding_level_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup android:id="@+id/chipLevelGroup" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipLevelA1" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="A1" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_background_selector" app:chipStrokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipLevelA2" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="A2" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_background_selector" app:chipStrokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" />
<com.google.android.material.chip.Chip android:id="@+id/chipLevelB1" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="B1" app:chipBackgroundColor="@color/chip_background_selector" app:chipStrokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:chipStrokeWidth="1dp" /> </com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup>
<TextView android:id="@+id/textSelectionSummary" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/onboarding_summary_empty" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonContinue" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="22dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/woofie_accent" android:enabled="false" android:text="@string/onboarding_continue" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingBottom="10dp">
<FrameLayout android:id="@+id/nodeAnchor" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="64dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textNodeBadge" android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/lesson_node_unlocked" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" /> </FrameLayout>
<View android:id="@+id/pathConnector" android:layout_width="6dp" android:layout_height="26dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:background="@color/woofie_primary_light" /> </LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingBottom="8dp">
<FrameLayout android:id="@+id/nodeAnchor" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="86dp">
<View android:id="@+id/nodeShadow" android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/lesson_node_locked" android:alpha="0.25" android:translationY="6dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textNodeBadge" android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/lesson_node_unlocked" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" /> </FrameLayout>
<View android:id="@+id/pathConnector" android:layout_width="8dp" android:layout_height="34dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:background="@color/woofie_primary_light" /> </LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <item name="lessonProgressBar" type="id" /> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Woofie</string> <string name="wolf_content_description">Mascota lobo de Woofie</string>
<string name="onboarding_title">Bienvenido a Woofie</string> <string name="onboarding_subtitle">Tu app de ingles profesional con sesiones rapidas, claras y entretenidas.</string> <string name="onboarding_profession_title">Elige tu profesion</string> <string name="onboarding_level_title">Nivel sugerido para empezar</string> <string name="onboarding_summary">Ruta lista: %1$s - Nivel %2$s</string> <string name="onboarding_summary_empty">Selecciona profesion y nivel para activar tu plan.</string> <string name="onboarding_continue">Crear mi ruta</string>
<string name="profession_it">Tecnologia e IT</string> <string name="profession_health">Salud</string> <string name="profession_sales">Ventas y atencion</string> <string name="level_a1">A1</string> <string name="level_a2">A2</string> <string name="level_b1">B1</string>
<string name="home_greeting">Hola, vamos por tu racha</string> <string name="home_profession_detail">Ruta: %1$s (Nivel %2$s)\nFoco de hoy: %3$s</string> <string name="home_streak">Racha: %1$d dias | Lecciones: %2$d | XP: %3$d</string> <string name="home_start_lesson">Empezar leccion del dia</string> <string name="home_open_progress">Ver progreso</string>
<string name="lesson_progress">Pregunta %1$d de %2$d</string> <string name="lesson_goal">Meta de la leccion: minimo 8 de 10 correctas.</string> <string name="lesson_check">Revisar respuesta</string> <string name="lesson_next">Siguiente</string> <string name="lesson_select_option">Elige una opcion para continuar.</string> <string name="lesson_correct">Excelente. Tu respuesta es correcta.</string> <string name="lesson_incorrect">Casi. Respuesta correcta: %1$s</string>
<string name="progress_title">Buen trabajo en %1$s</string> <string name="progress_summary">Lecciones completadas: %1$d\nRacha actual: %2$d dias\nXP acumulado: %3$d\nNivel actual: %4$s</string> <string name="progress_last_result">Resultado de hoy: %1$s</string> <string name="progress_points_earned">Puntos ganados en esta leccion: +%1$d XP</string> <string name="progress_pass_status">Estado: %1$s (objetivo minimo 8/10)</string> <string name="progress_passed">Leccion aprobada</string> <string name="progress_not_passed">Leccion completada, sigue practicando</string> <string name="progress_back_home">Volver al inicio</string> <string name="progress_restart">Reiniciar plan profesional</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Woofie</string> <string name="wolf_content_description">Mascota lobo de Woofie</string>
<string name="onboarding_title">Bienvenido a Woofie</string> <string name="onboarding_subtitle">Tu app de ingles profesional con sesiones rapidas, claras y entretenidas.</string> <string name="onboarding_profession_title">Elige tu profesion</string> <string name="onboarding_level_title">Nivel sugerido para empezar</string> <string name="onboarding_summary">Ruta lista: %1$s - Nivel %2$s</string> <string name="onboarding_summary_empty">Selecciona profesion y nivel para activar tu plan.</string> <string name="onboarding_continue">Crear mi ruta</string>
<string name="profession_it">Tecnologia e IT</string> <string name="profession_health">Salud</string> <string name="profession_sales">Ventas y atencion</string> <string name="level_a1">A1</string> <string name="level_a2">A2</string> <string name="level_b1">B1</string>
<string name="home_greeting">Hola, vamos por tu racha</string> <string name="home_profession_detail">Ruta: %1$s (Nivel %2$s)\nFoco de hoy: %3$s</string> <string name="home_streak">Racha: %1$d dias | Lecciones: %2$d | XP: %3$d</string> <string name="home_start_lesson">Ver mapa de lecciones</string> <string name="home_open_progress">Ver progreso</string>
<string name="lesson_path_title">Camino Woofie</string> <string name="lesson_path_subtitle">Completa tus lecciones en orden. Los cuadrados se desbloquean al avanzar.</string> <string name="lesson_path_trail_title">Camino numerico</string> <string name="lesson_path_trail_prefix">Camino: %1$s</string>
<string name="lesson_progress">Pregunta %1$d de %2$d</string> <string name="lesson_goal">Meta de la leccion: minimo 6 de 8 correctas.</string> <string name="lesson_check">Revisar respuesta</string> <string name="lesson_next">Siguiente</string> <string name="lesson_select_option">Elige una opcion para continuar.</string> <string name="lesson_correct">Excelente. Tu respuesta es correcta.</string> <string name="lesson_incorrect">Casi. Respuesta correcta: %1$s</string> <string name="lesson_feedback_title">Por que esta mal esta respuesta</string> <string name="lesson_feedback_body">Elegiste "%1$s", pero en este contexto la expresion correcta es "%2$s". Esa opcion comunica la idea profesional esperada para esta situacion.</string> <string name="lesson_feedback_expand">Toca para ampliar</string> <string name="lesson_feedback_collapse">Toca para contraer</string>
<string name="progress_title">Buen trabajo en %1$s</string> <string name="progress_summary">Lecciones completadas: %1$d\nRacha actual: %2$d dias\nXP acumulado: %3$d\nNivel actual: %4$s</string> <string name="progress_last_result">Resultado de hoy: %1$s</string> <string name="progress_points_earned">Puntos ganados en esta leccion: +%1$d XP</string> <string name="progress_pass_status">Estado: %1$s (objetivo minimo 6/8)</string> <string name="progress_passed">Leccion aprobada</string> <string name="progress_not_passed">Leccion completada, sigue practicando</string> <string name="progress_back_home">Volver al inicio</string> <string name="progress_restart">Reiniciar plan profesional</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <corners android:radius="14dp" /> <solid android:color="#28000000" /> </shape>
